tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Strumming Pattern: DDU DUDU

*= single strum down

(The DDU Part is For Em And C And The DUDU Part Is For Bm And Am)

Chords: [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[Intro]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh,  I'm Sorry, Sorry That You Love Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Change My Mind Up Like It's Origami[/tab]
N.C
(Kisses,kisses)

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Kisses To My Exes Who Don't Give A Shit About Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
They'll Never Call Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
But I Still Keep They're Number In The Necklace[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        
Kisses to my Exes[/tab]

(The Chords Are The Same Throughout The Song)

[Verse]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Happens Every Time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't mean, mean to be cold, but that's how[/tab]

I get, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
Me and all my pride[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
Tryna burn down every damn bridge anytime we[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
can, and again[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]*           [ch]Bm[/ch]*    [ch]C[/ch]*
Let's just say it is what it is and was what[/tab]

[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
all up in my head[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]

Am,
dirty
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]*               [ch]Bm[/ch]*             [ch]C[/ch]*

[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]*
